features: Clearasil Ultra Rapid Action Deep Pore Treatment toner works fast to open blocked pores, by using a spot fighting ingredient that works throughout the day to deliver a visibly clearer skin in as little as 4 hours
✔️ IMPROVES SKIN TEXTURE & TONE: Clearasil Ultra Rapid Deep Pore Treatment toner reduces redness and inflammation for a clearer skin, fighting clogged pores

✔️ SALICYLIC ACID & GLYCERIN FOR REFINING PORES - Specially formulated face cleanser ideal for unclogging and keeping pores clear, while helping to control excess sebum and soothing sensitive skin prone to acne, spots or breakouts
✔️ PREVENT the appearance of new spots by unclogging the pores and removing dirt
✔️ DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED - Suitable for all skin types, even sensitive
description: Product Description Face the world with clarity, thanks to Clearasil Rapid Action Clearing Toner. Clearasil skin science says that when fighting breakouts, faster is better. It cleans deep into pores to remove dirt, oil and dead skin cells, providing visibly clearer skin in as little as 4 hours so you can get on with your day with confidence Ingredients Aqua, alcohol denat, salicylic acid, glycerin, isoceteth-20, sorbitol, sodium hydroxide, parfum, lavandula stoechas extract, helichrysum italicum extract, cistus monspeliensis extract, alcohol, tris (tetramethylhydroxypiperidinol) citrate, CI 42090. Directions After cleansing your face, dab the product on your skin with a cotton pad Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Denat alcohol can cause skin irritation. Box Contains 1 x Clearasil Ultra Rapid Action Deep Pore Treatment Toner 200 ml See more
